faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with Glowave.
faq.q1: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a1: Most business websites take around 2–4 weeks depending on complexity and revisions.
faq.q2: Do you provide SEO with website development?
faq.a2: Yes, every website we build includes foundational SEO optimization.
faq.q3: Can you redesign my existing website?
faq.a3: Yes, we specialize in redesigning outdated websites into modern digital platforms.
faq.a4: Yes, we offer ongoing support, maintenance, and updates.
faq.q5: What industries do you work with?
faq.a5: We work with startups, SaaS companies, and growing businesses.
